title: work-at Dashboard App Quick Tunnel Surface
description: Fast health profile for the worker-hosted dashboard-app quick-tunnel surface.

checks.title: work-at target is reachable
checks.repairHint: Restore worker connectivity or re-register the dashboard-app target before attempting a quick tunnel.

checks.title: dashboard-app path exists
checks.repairHint: Restore or re-register the dashboard-app path on the worker before attempting a quick tunnel.

checks.title: Bun is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Bun on the worker before running the dashboard app dev server.

checks.title: cloudflared is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install or expose `cloudflared` on the worker before attempting a quick tunnel. Do not fall back to localhost.run for this workflow.

checks.title: agent-browser is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install or expose `agent-browser` on the worker before relying on the dashboard quick-tunnel dev surface health gate.

checks.title: repo-aware Git askpass helper exists on target
checks.repairHint: Run `bash tools/github-app-token.sh install-askpass` and point `git config core.askpass` at `/home/ec2-user/.config/agent-github/git-askpass.sh` on the worker before relying on GitHub pushes.

checks.title: dashboard-app package.json exists on target
checks.repairHint: Restore `package.json` in the dashboard-app surface before starting a quick tunnel workflow.

checks.title: dashboard-app vite config exists on target
checks.repairHint: Restore `vite.config.ts` in the dashboard-app surface before starting a worker quick tunnel workflow.

checks.title: dashboard-app Bun gateway is reachable
checks.repairHint: Start the Bun dashboard gateway on the worker and verify it responds locally before attempting a quick tunnel.

checks.title: dashboard-app Vite frontend is reachable behind the gateway
checks.repairHint: Start the dashboard-app Vite frontend on the worker and verify it responds locally before attempting a quick tunnel.

checks.title: cloudflared quick tunnel is active for the Bun gateway
checks.repairHint: Run a worker-local `cloudflared tunnel --url http://127.0.0.1:3300 --no-autoupdate` for this surface. Do not use localhost.run for this workflow.

checks.title: worker Git push auth is ready
checks.repairHint: Restore the repo-aware Git askpass setup and verify `git push --dry-run origin <branch>` succeeds on the worker before relying on GitHub pushes.

checks.title: quick tunnel serves the dashboard shell and storyboard plugin route
checks.repairHint: Repair the worker dashboard gateway, the 3300 quick tunnel, or the storyboard plugin route until the dashboard root and the storyboard debug route both render on the same quick tunnel host before handing a URL to the user.
